issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Add buy button to static HTML page with size variant
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented Snipcart CDN script include, data-api-key div, and the snipcart-add-item class with data-item-* attributes including data-item-custom1-name/options for size; baseline reaches for a generic JS cart or Stripe rather than the attribute-driven pattern.

scenarios.name: Track add-to-cart and order confirmation events in analytics
scenarios.rationale: Treatment listens for the snipcart.ready DOM event and calls Snipcart.api.cart.items.added and Snipcart.api.cart.confirmed exactly as the skill documents; baseline tries to wire ecommerce events through DOM clicks or generic Stripe webhooks instead of the documented JS API.
